Video.summary: Harrison saves a Korean tour group caught in a rip. Reidy attempts to become the greatest Bondi Santa.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 03

Video.summary: A lifeless swimmer is dragged from the water. Lifeguards compete in a fancy dress surfing competition.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 10

Video.summary: Harrison's life is in danger when a double rescue goes horribly wrong.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 10

Video.summary: Lifeguards respond to a suspected heart attack. Two green whistles are used for a dislocated shoulder.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards conduct an experiment, attempting to combat the lack of beachgoers reading dangerous current signs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 09

Video.summary: A car crashes on to Bondi Beach. Taco flips the jetski, ruining his plans to impress Hoppo before he leaves.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 06

Video.summary: A young boy suffers a spinal injury on his birthday. Lifeguards bring their kids to Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 07

Video.summary: Jesse responds to a report of a man falling from cliffs. A thick fog makes it impossible to see swimmers.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 08

Video.summary: The biggest mass rescue in years sees Bondi Beach closed. Nicola joins the team and leads a mass rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 02

Video.summary: New lifeguard Will attends to an unconscious teen. Harries helps tame a fleet of giant inflatables.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 04

Video.summary: A Japanese tourist drowns just metres from lifeguards trying to save him. Beardy races to 2 Nepalese men.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 01

Video.summary: Jesse fractures his spine and Jake rescues a beginner surfer being smashed against cliffs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 13

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a number of mass rescues. Trainee Harrison is tasked with counting the people on the beach.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 11

Video.summary: A diabetic suffers an epileptic fit and Troy catches bag thieves operating on Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 05

Video.summary: Lifeguards perform CPR on a man initially complaining of chest pains who suddenly has a cardiac arrest.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards sound the shark alarm. Young lifeguard Jake must retrieve a dead body
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 10

Video.summary: A man assaults women in the surf. Lifeguards take part in a 30 day fitness and diet challenge.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 12

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a deep water spinal rescue, and try catch a rat that’s been eating cables in their buggies.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 11

Video.summary: A backpacker has a violent seizure for over 15 minutes. Sam attempts a daring move during a dangerous rescue.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lfeguards treat an anaphylactic shock patient for the first time and perform a surprising Christmas rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 03

Video.summary: A man falls off the jetski rescue mat. Crowds swell to 40,010 so Hoppo must decide whether to clear the water.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 01

Video.summary: Lifeguards play a final prank on Harrison. Nicola faces her fear of open water when a boat sinks off Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 13

Video.summary: Bondi faces a bluebottle invasion. Singlets attends his own son's spinal injury. Clint rescues a drowning man.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 05

Video.summary: Reidy attempts a world record while a girl is blown kilometres out to sea on a paddle board.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 08

Video.summary: Trainee Lachie completes his first big solo rescue. The team farewell one of their most dedicated lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 08

Video.summary: New Years Eve brings massive crowds. Reidy and Azza race to a man who’s dislocated his shoulder in the water.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 04

Video.summary: Hoppo shows newbies how to perform a mass-rescue single handedly. Trainee Burkey faces his first drowning.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 01

Video.summary: Bondi local body builder Dimitri breaks both legs falling down a cliff. A paddleboarder snaps her collar bone.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 08

Video.summary: A German tourist breaks his back, and trainees Taco and Jesse compete in the annual lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 11

Video.summary: Chappo nabs a bag snatcher. Whippet and Reidy treat an unconscious woman. A skateboarder dislocates his ankle.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 10

Video.summary: A drunk woman goes missing. The most critical rescue of the season stirs up emotional memories for Terry.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 06

Video.summary: Borders open, tourists flood Bondi. Chase explores a shark colony with a local diver.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 06

Video.summary: Spotlights illuminate World Pride Beach Party with 15,010 revelers. Hoppo marks 30 years on the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 11

Video.summary: Lifeguards try conquer their fear of sharks and must recover the body of a young man found dead in the surf.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 09

Video.summary: Jack and Azza aid a perplexing surfer. Maxi enforces rules in rescues, facing unprecedented challenges later.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 02

Video.summary: Bisho performs a cliff-face rescue with limited gear. Trainee Taco redeems himself with a big surf rescue.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 08

Video.summary: New Years Eve brings drunk swimmers, buggy thieves and shark sightings prompting a beach evacuation of 40,010.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 03

Video.summary: The Rooster NRL team injure Yatesy on a rescue board. A teenager breaks her nose. Luke rescues a deaf patient.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 12

Video.summary: Kite surfers visit a stormy Bondi. Chappo and Jack aid victim of chest pain, Harries confronts a body surfer.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 10

Video.summary: On New Year's Day lifeguards handle drunk beachgoers. Harries faces a career-defining challenge with a baby.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 04

Video.summary: Harry risks losing his job, thieves face a violent citizens arrest and a mother searches for her daughter.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 01

Video.summary: Maxi juggles both lifeguarding and firefighting, as the other lifeguards face rescues with language barriers.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 02

Video.summary: An elderly lady suffers a seizure. A bizarre injury occurs involving a dog and a man's wounded manhood.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 09

Video.summary: Chappo rushes in for a life and death rescue in the monster swells, but things don’t go as planned.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 04

Video.summary: Lifeguards deal with a missing boy and two friends - one dislocates his hip, the other has a seizure.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 07

Video.summary: A young local suffers a serious skating accident. Festive spirit turns deadly with alcohol affected swimmers.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 05

Video.summary: Julie learns the ropes on Bondi. A man confronts a photographer taking pictures of his topless girlfriend.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 08

Video.summary: Yatesy attempts to rescue an inexperienced surfer. After shark sightings, the lifeguards test new technology.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 11

Video.summary: A large bull shark prompts lifeguards to sound the alarm, clearing thousands of swimmers from the water.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 01
